title: Clervaux, Clervaux Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Clervaux, Clervaux Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Clervaux is a city in Clervaux Canton with a population of 5,300. A scenic town in the Luxembourg Ardennes, famous for its stunning medieval castle, the Family of Man photography exhibition, and the Benedictine Abbey.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
